---
title: "run_incremental_test.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/run_incremental_test.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.47
style_score: 3.43
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.53
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating run_incremental.

## Interaction Protocol
Import run_incremental and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `run_incremental`
